name: Eraser.io AI Diagram & Documentation API
what_it_does: AI-powered technical diagramming and documentation tool with REST API for generating flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and technical docs from natural language or code — supporting Mermaid, custom diagram syntax, and collaborative editing.
use_cases: Generating architecture and flowchart diagrams from text descriptions via AI API
Creating sequence diagrams from API call flows for technical documentation agents
Automating technical documentation generation from code and system descriptions
Exporting diagrams as PNG, SVG, or PDF for documentation embedding
Building AI-powered documentation workflows that keep diagrams updated
not_for: Complex interactive diagrams with runtime data (use Grafana or Kibana)
Enterprise architecture tools with asset management (use LeanIX or MEGA)
Diagramming at scale without AI generation (use Lucidchart)
best_when: An agent generates technical documentation and diagrams from code or natural language descriptions, needing AI-powered diagram creation without manual drawing.
avoid_when: You need live data-driven diagrams or complex enterprise architecture tooling.

auth.notes: API key from Eraser account. Passed as Bearer token. Account-scoped access. Team workspace support for shared diagram management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: limited diagram generations and exports
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro from $12/month; Team from $8/user/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: AI diagram generation consumed from credit pool. Affordable for developer teams. Growing product with active development. Popular for technical documentation automation.

performance.rate_limits: AI generation rate-limited; export operations faster

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documentation covers diagram creation and export. AI generation endpoints documented with prompt guidance. Error responses are JSON. Rate limit headers included in responses.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Diagram read and export are idempotent. AI generation creates new diagram content each call — not deterministic. Diagram updates overwrite previous content.
known_agent_gotchas: AI generation is non-deterministic — same prompt may produce different diagrams
Export formats may have rendering differences — test output before production use
Growing product — API surface may change; pin to documented version
Rate limits on AI generation can slow documentation pipeline automation

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. No formal compliance certifications listed. US data residency. Diagram content sent to AI services for generation — review privacy policy for sensitive diagrams.
